method.generated_inventory: final gate, policy, and distributions before attestation
method.phase_fixture_inventory: whole source blobs for changed crates/**/*.rs paths whose path or source identifies test or fixture code
method.placeholder_policy: exact redaction tokens or structured leading fixture markers; arbitrary substring matches are rejected
method.retained_inventory: all changed JSON below docs/reviews/evidence in the phase range plus every hash-pinned reused artifact
method.semantic_limit: arbitrary human prose cannot be classified as private mechanically; the hash-bound inventory supports mandatory reviewer inspection
method.synthetic_path_policy: only exact checked-in fixture paths in SYNTHETIC_FIXTURE_PATHS; unlisted roots and descendants are rejected

rules.absolute_private_path: absolute user or private temporary paths
rules.credential_material: API keys, bearer credentials, JWTs, and private keys
rules.private_prompt_content: personal prompt content and private contact data
rules.reusable_turn_state: reusable response, conversation, or encrypted turn state
